data.html:
// Signal Marketplace Types

export type UserRole = 'subscriber' | 'provider' | 'admin';

export type ProviderStatus = 'pending' | 'active' | 'suspended' | 'rejected';

export type ProviderTier = 'new' | 'registered' | 'verified' | 'top' | 'elite';

export type SignalDirection = 'BUY' | 'SELL';

export type SignalStatus = 'active' | 'tp1_hit' | 'tp2_hit' | 'tp3_hit' | 'sl_hit' | 'closed';

export type SignalTimeframe = 'scalp' | 'day' | 'swing' | 'position';

export type SignalRisk = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';

export type PaymentMethod = 'crypto' | 'mtn_momo' | 'airtel_money' | 'card';

export type PaymentStatus = 'pending' | 'confirmed' | 'failed' | 'refunded';

export type SubscriptionStatus = 'active' | 'expired' | 'cancelled';

// User
export interface User {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  name: string;
  avatar?: string;
  phone?: string;
  role: UserRole;
  
  // Email Verification
  emailVerified: boolean;
  emailVerifiedAt?: Date;
  
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}

// Email Verification Code
export interface VerificationCode {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  code: string;
  type: 'email_verification' | 'password_reset' | 'login_verification';
  expiresAt: Date;
  usedAt?: Date;
  createdAt: Date;
}

// Provider Profile
export interface ProviderProfile {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  displayName: string;
  bio?: string;
  avatar?: string;
  status: ProviderStatus;
  tier: ProviderTier;
  
  // Wallet addresses
  binanceWallet?: string;
  ethereumWallet?: string;
  mtnMomoNumber?: string;
  airtelMoneyNumber?: string;
  
  // Subscription plans (in UGX)
  weeklyPrice: number;
  monthlyPrice: number;
  quarterlyPrice: number;
  yearlyPrice: number;
  
  // Stats (calculated)
  totalSignals: number;
  winRate: number;
  totalPips: number;
  totalSubscribers: number;
  activeSubscribers: number;
  
  // Specialization
  pairs: string[]; // e.g., ['EUR/USD', 'XAU/USD', 'BTC/USD']
  timeframes: SignalTimeframe[];
  
  // Verification
  isVerified: boolean;
  verifiedAt?: Date;
  
  // Rating
  averageRating: number;
  totalReviews: number;
  
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}

// Signal
export interface Signal {
  id: string;
  providerId: string;
  provider?: ProviderProfile;
  
  // Signal details
  pair: string;
  direction: SignalDirection;
  entryPrice: number;
  entryZoneLow?: number; // For range entries
  entryZoneHigh?: number;
  
  // Targets
  tp1: number;
  tp2?: number;
  tp3?: number;
  stopLoss: number;
  
  // Metadata
  timeframe: SignalTimeframe;
  risk: SignalRisk;
  analysis?: string;
  chartImage?: string;
  
  // Status
  status: SignalStatus;
  statusUpdatedAt?: Date;
  closedAt?: Date;
  closedPrice?: number;
  
  // Performance (calculated when closed)
  pips?: number;
  outcome?: 'win' | 'loss' | 'breakeven';
  
  // Visibility
  isFree: boolean; // Free preview for non-subscribers
  isPublished: boolean;
  
  // Timestamps
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
  
  // Stats
  viewsCount: number;
}

// Subscription
export interface Subscription {
  id: string;
  subscriberId: string;
  providerId: string;
  provider?: ProviderProfile;
  
  // Plan
  plan: 'weekly' | 'monthly' | 'quarterly' | 'yearly';
  price: number;
  
  // Status
  status: SubscriptionStatus;
  
  // Dates
  startDate: Date;
  endDate: Date;
  cancelledAt?: Date;
  
  // Payment
  paymentId?: string;
  
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}

// Payment
export interface Payment {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  providerId?: string;
  subscriptionId?: string;
  
  // Amount
  amount: number;
  platformFee: number;
  providerAmount: number;
  currency: 'UGX' | 'USD' | 'USDT';
  
  // Method
  method: PaymentMethod;
  
  // Crypto details
  txHash?: string;
  walletAddress?: string;
  
  // Mobile money details
  phoneNumber?: string;
  momoReference?: string;
  
  // Status
  status: PaymentStatus;
  confirmedAt?: Date;
  
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}

// Review
export interface Review {
  id: string;
  subscriberId: string;
  providerId: string;
  subscriptionId: string;
  
  rating: number; // 1-5
  comment?: string;
  
  isPublished: boolean;
  
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
}

// Notification
export interface Notification {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  type: 'new_signal' | 'tp_hit' | 'subscription_expiring' | 'payment_confirmed' | 'new_subscriber' | 'new_review';
  title: string;
  message: string;
  data?: Record;
  
  isRead: boolean;
  readAt?: Date;
  
  createdAt: Date;
}

// Platform Settings (Admin)
export interface PlatformSettings {
  id: string;
  
  // Fees
  cryptoFeePercent: number; // e.g., 5
  mobileMoneyFeePercent: number; // e.g., 7
  
  // Verification
  verificationFeeUGX: number;
  featuredListingFeeUGX: number;
  proToolsFeeUGX: number;
  
  // Provider requirements
  minSignalsForVerified: number;
  minWinRateForVerified: number;
  
  updatedAt: Date;
}

// Default platform settings
export const DEFAULT_PLATFORM_SETTINGS: PlatformSettings = {
  id: 'default',
  cryptoFeePercent: 5,
  mobileMoneyFeePercent: 7,
  verificationFeeUGX: 50000,
  featuredListingFeeUGX: 30000,
  proToolsFeeUGX: 20000,
  minSignalsForVerified: 50,
  minWinRateForVerified: 60,
  updatedAt: new Date(),
};

// Currency pairs available
export const CURRENCY_PAIRS = [
  // Forex Majors
  'EUR/USD', 'GBP/USD', 'USD/JPY', 'USD/CHF',
  'AUD/USD', 'USD/CAD', 'NZD/USD',
  // Forex Crosses
  'EUR/GBP', 'EUR/JPY', 'GBP/JPY', 'AUD/JPY',
  'EUR/AUD', 'GBP/AUD', 'EUR/CHF', 'GBP/CHF',
  // Commodities
  'XAU/USD', 'XAG/USD', 'WTI/USD', 'BRENT/USD',
  // Indices
  'US30', 'US500', 'NAS100', 'UK100', 'GER40',
  // Crypto
  'BTC/USD', 'ETH/USD', 'XRP/USD', 'SOL/USD',
] as const;

// Tier badges
export const TIER_BADGES: Record = {
  new: { label: 'New Provider', color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600', icon: '🔰' },
  registered: { label: 'Registered', color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-600', icon: '📝' },
  verified: { label: 'Verified', color: 'bg-green-100 text-green-600', icon: '✅' },
  top: { label: 'Top Provider', color: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-600', icon: '🏆' },
  elite: { label: 'Elite', color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-600', icon: '💎' },
};
